channel.title: Track Awesome List Daily Updates
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: Jun 28th, 2021
item.description:
1. avajs/awesome-ava

Articles

  • Recipes

    • 2. protontypes/awesome-robotic-tooling

    Datasets

  • ONCE dataset - A large-scale autonomous driving dataset with 2D&3D object annotations.

    • 3. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    Forms

  • HeroTofu.com - Forms backend with bot detection and encrypted archive. Forward submissions via UI to email, Slack, or Zapier. Use your own frontend, no server code required. Free plan gives unlimited forms and 50 submissions per month.

item.title: Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
1. APA-Technology-Division/urban-and-regional-planning-resources

Platforms and Software Resources

Urban Design Tools and Platforms

  • GIMP - GIMP is an open cross-platform image editor available for GNU/Linux, macOS, Windows and more operating systems.
  • Adobe Creative Suite - Adobe's collection of 20+ desktop and mobile apps and services for photography, design, video, web, UX, and more. Popular products include Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, and others.
  • Inkscape - Inkscape is vector-based, open graphic manipulation tool often used as a counterpart to GIMP.

    • Public Data Resources

    Transportation

  • Rapid Transit Database - Collection of all rapid transit corridors worldwide, including bus rapid transit, light rail, and subway, published by the Institute for Transportation & Development Policy.
  • Transit Equity Dashboards - Equity analysis of transit systems in seven (and counting) US cities, published by TransitCenter.

    • 2. awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted

    External links

  • Awesome Sysadminstars11.9k - Curated list of amazingly awesome open source sysadmin resources.

    • 3. kdeldycke/awesome-iam

    Authorization

    Open-source policy frameworks

  • Biscuit - Biscuit merge concepts from cookies, JWTs, macaroons and Open Policy Agent. “It provide a logic language based on Datalog to write authorization policies. It can store data, like JWT, or small conditions like Macaroons, but it is also able to represent more complex rules like role-based access control, delegation, hierarchies.”

    • 4. thangchung/awesome-dotnet-core

    Frameworks, Libraries and Tools

    Misc

  • Dotnet outdatedstars307 - A .NET Core global tool to display and update outdated NuGet packages in a project

item.title: Jun 26th, 2021
item.description:
1. quozd/awesome-dotnet

Application Frameworks

  • Fusionstars930 - .NET Core and Blazor library that attempts to dramatically improve the way we implement real-time and high-load services by introducing a novel kind of "computed observables" - immutable, thread-safe, and most importantly, almost invisible for developers. Samples 1stars74 Samples 2stars40

    • E-Commerce and Payments

  • GrandNodestars73 - Headless, multi-vendor, multi-tenant, the most advanced open source e-commerce platform based on .NET Core 5.0 and MongoDB.

    • Caching

  • FusionCachestars67 - An easy to use, high performance and robust cache with an optional distributed 2nd layer and some advanced features, like a fail-safe mechanism and advanced timeouts management

    • 2. fffaraz/awesome-cpp

    Math

  • NumCppstars1.7k - A templatized header only C++ implementation of the Python Numpy library. [MIT]

item.title: Jun 25th, 2021
item.description:
1. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

Themes

  • razstars1 - Minimal prompt, includes git status decorations.

    • 2. balintkissdev/awesome-dos

    Development tools

    Scripting languages and interpreters for DOS

  • DOjSstars266 - JavaScript programming environment for MS-DOS, FreeDOS or any DOS-based Windows (like 95, 98, ME).
  • Lua for DOS - Online demo of Lua 5.3.5, compiled for MS-DOS on the Intel 80486 processor.
  • Micropython for FreeDOSstars7 - FreeDOS ad-hoc module for micropythonstars12.5k.
  • perldos - Perl for DOS.
  • PythonD - Python for DOS, including multi-threading, networking and OpenGL.

    • 3. FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp

    REST and API

  • 🍓 MixerApi - Streamline development of modern RESTful APIs for your teams CakePHP project.

    • 4. aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss

    Tools

  • 🎨🌍🔧 Tailwind Gradient Generator - Create perfect Tailwind CSS gradients with zero lines of code.

    • 5. mateusortiz/webcomponents-the-right-way

    Guides

    Accessibility

  • Web Components punch list

    • Guides

    Codelabs

  • Open Web Components: Codelabs

    • Guides

    Examples

  • open-wc code examples - Collection of best practices and design patterns for developing web components.

    • 6. love2d-community/awesome-love2d

    UI

  • Heliumstars26 - A modern, customizable, high performance retained UI framework.

    • 7. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Components & Libraries

    Responsive

  • Qui-maxstars16 - A Vue 3.x Design System for Web

    • Components & Libraries

    i18n

  • v-google-translatestars13 - A component that use google translate to internationalize your Vue.js app.

    • 8. playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas

    Automotive

  • BMW Car Design - Interactive exploration of BMW design.

    • 9. fkromer/awesome-ros2

    Packages

    RMW (ROS middleware)

  • rmw_zenohstars13 - ROS2 RMW layer for zenoh.
  • rmw_iceoryxstars52 - Enables usage of the inter-process-communication middleware Eclipse iceoryx.

item.title: Jun 24th, 2021
item.description:
1. meirwah/awesome-incident-response

IR tools Collection

Playbooks

  • AWS Incident Response Runbook Samples - AWS IR Runbook Samples meant to be customized per each entity using them. The three samples are: "DoS or DDoS attack", "credential leakage", and "unintended access to an Amazon S3 bucket".

    • 2. EbookFoundation/free-programming-books

    Cloud Computing

  • Cloud Design Patterns

    • 3. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Themes

  • whalesstars0 - Includes decorators for git status, java version, last command return status, and directory.

    • 4. ramnes/awesome-mongodb

    Tools

    Desktop

  • MongoDB for VS Code - Connect to MongoDB and prototype queries from VS Code
  • Compass - Free Cross-platform GUI from MongoDB

    • Resources

    Documentation

  • MongoDB developer blog

    • Libraries

    Rust

  • mongodb-rust-driverstars685 - Official Rust driver

    • 5. veggiemonk/awesome-docker

    Container Operations

    Security

  • KICSstars496 - an infrastructure-as-code scanning tool, find security vulnerabilities, compliance issues, and infrastructure misconfigurations early in the development cycle. Can be extended for additional policies. By Checkmarx

    • 6. tmcw/awesome-geojson

    validation

  • gjfstars80: A tool to fix invalid GeoJSON objects

    • 7. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Components & Libraries

    Integrations

  • vue-tweetstars9 - Vue 3 component that let you embed tweets in your App by only giving the tweet id

item.title: Jun 23rd, 2021
item.description:
1. kitspace/awesome-electronics

Learning

Theory and Courses

  • NEETS (Navy Electricity and Electronics Training Series) (alternative link)- U.S. Navy Non-Resident Training Course Material.

    • 2. APA-Technology-Division/urban-and-regional-planning-resources

    Public Data Resources

    Equity and Environmental Justice

  • Location Affordability Index - The Location Affordability Index (LAI) works to close this gap by providing estimates of household housing and transportation costs at the neighborhood level along with constituent data on the built environment and demographics.

    • 3. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Plugins

  • asdf-direnvstars0 - Integration and completions for asdfstars10.7k and direnvstars174.

    • Themes

  • mini-simplestars0 - Minimalist. Includes vcs status decorations.

    • 4. jaywcjlove/awesome-mac

    Audio and Video Tools

  • Popcorn Time - Watch torrent movies instantly, This Popcorn Time service will never be taken down. Download and enjoy.

    • Design and Product

    Other Tools

  • Eagle App - Simple and intuitive file manager with tag and annotaion for all your design files. Supports all major source, image, RAW, video, 3D, audio, font, and office files.

    • Developer Tools

    Command Line Tools

  • Miller - Like awk, sed, cut, join, and sort for name-indexed data such as CSV, TSV, and tabular JSON.

    • 5. awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted

    Note-taking and Editors

  • Notes'n'Todosstars0 - Write notes and todos online in markdown with tag filtering and date sorting. (Demo) MIT Python

    • Polls and Events

    Booking and Scheduling

  • Calendso - The open-source online appointment scheduling system. (Demo, Source Codestars4k) MIT Nodejs

    • URL Shorteners

  • Link - A minimal, SQLite-backed URL shortener. (Demo, Source Code) GPL-3.0 Go

    • 6. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Components & Libraries

    Map

  • vue3-openlayersstars4 - Vue 3 components to work with OpenLayers.

    • Components & Libraries

    PDF

  • cafe-pdfstars0 - Render PDF files on Vue pages using pdf.js, supporting text rendering, lazy loading, paging, scaling, and printing. Demo

    • 7. zudochkin/awesome-newsletters

    Marketing

  • tldrMarketing. Get the latest breaking news and trends about digital marketing without all the fluff.
  • Zero to Marketing. A weekly email with 5-minute case study with actionable tips.

    • 8. HollyAdele/awesome-programming-for-kids

    Lower Elementary

  • Code Monkey - more graphics to learn Python type of code. ( Not-free for advanced levels )
  • Lightbot - Solve puzzles with commands, loops, and conditionals. Comes in Lightbot and lightbot Jr, and a mobile app or a desktop website.

    • 9. jetli/awesome-yew

    Projects

  • Sea_battlestars0 - A simple example of a sea battle game. Rust + Yew.

    • 10. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    APIs, Data and ML

  • Deepnote - A new kind of data science notebook. Jupyter-compatible with real-time collaboration and running in the cloud. Free tier includes unlimited personal projects, up to 750 hours of standard hardware and teams with up to 3 editors.
  • reqres.in - A Free hosted REST-API ready to respond to your AJAX requests.

    • Tools for Teams and Collaboration

  • Duckly — Talk and collaborate in real-time with your team. Pair programming with any IDE, terminal sharing, voice, video and screen sharing. Free for small teams.
  • robocorp.com - Open-source stack for powering Automation Ops. Try out Cloud features and implement simple automations for free. Robot work 240 min/month, 10 Assistant runs, Storage of 100 MB.

    • Code Quality

  • SoftaCheck — An online tool that performs static analysis for C/C++ code using open source tools such as cppcheck and clang-tidy and automatically generates code documentation for users using doxygen. This tool is free for use.

    • 11. substrate-developer-hub/awesome-substrate

    Ecosystem Tools

  • polkadot-runtime-prom-exporter - A Prometheus exporter for Polkadot runtime metrics (modifable for substrate use).

item.title: Jun 22nd, 2021
item.description:
1. ripienaar/free-for-dev

BaaS

  • getstream.io — Build scalable newsfeeds, activity streams, chat and messaging in a few hours instead of weeks

    • 2. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Projects Using Vue.js

    Apps/Websites

  • Darwin Analytics - Tool for measuring and optimizing your site. Built with Vue3 and Vite.

    • Components & Libraries

    Carousel

  • @egjs/vue-flicking - It's reliable, flexible and extendable carousel for Vue.js 2 & 3.

    • 3. gruhn/awesome-naming

    Theoretical Computer Science

  • Oracle - A black box that magically gives answers even to undeciable questions like the halting problem.

    • 4. iipc/awesome-web-archiving

    Tools & Software

    Acquisition

  • WAILstars237 - A graphical user interface (GUI) atop multiple web archiving tools intended to be used as an easy way for anyone to preserve and replay web pages; Python, Electronstars96. (Stable)
  • Warcproxstars263 - WARC-writing MITM HTTP/S proxy. (Stable)

    • 5. humanetech-community/awesome-humane-tech

    Blocklists

  • EasyList - Sets of rules that automatically remove unwanted content from the internet.

    • Internet of Things

  • OpenRGB - Open source RGB lighting control that doesn't depend on manufacturer software.

    • Privacy

  • personalDNSfilter - A DNS filter proxy to filter unwished hosts based on a host list.

    • 6. wernerkrauss/awesome-silverstripe-cms

    Tools

    IDE Plugins

  • Jetbrains / PHPStorm Silverstripe Template Language Support - Syntax highlighting for Silverstripe template files.

item.title: Jun 21st, 2021
item.description:
1. academic/awesome-datascience

Books

  • Effective Data Science Infrastructure

    • 2. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    Email

  • fakermail.com — Free, temporary email for testing with last 100 email accounts stored.

    • Other Free Resources

  • eu.org — Free eu.org domain. Request is usually approved in 14 days.

    • Tools for Teams and Collaboration

  • BookmarkOS.com - Free all-on-one bookmark manager, tab manager, and task manager in a customizable online desktop with folder collaboration.

    • 3. dreamingechoes/awesome-mental-health

    Articles

  • Beating Burnout: A Guide For Supporting Mental Health At Work - By Almanac Core.
  • How To Prevent Or Recover From Developer Burnout - By Anastasia.

    • 4. folkswhocode/awesome-diversity

    Organizations

  • TLA Black Women In Tech - Not-for-profit organisation dedicated to building bridges of opportunities in tech by enabling black female talents to excel and companies to have access to black women of talent.

    • 5. APA-Technology-Division/urban-and-regional-planning-resources

    Vendor Data Resources

    Infrastructure

  • Ecopia - Ecopia AI leverages AI to convert high resolution images of the earth into HD Vector Maps and to digitize infrastructure assets in a geospatial format.

    • Vendor Data Resources

    Demographic

  • Data Axle - Data Axle offers some of the most comprehensive and accurate business and consumer databases, boasting almost 400 distinct attributes across businesses and consumers in the United States and Canada.

    • 6. tmcw/awesome-geojson

    serialization

  • geojson-serializerstars2: serialize Java with annotations as GeoJSON

    • 7. aniftyco/awesome-tailwindcss

    Starters & Themes

  • 📟 new-tailwind-appstars58 - Creates React.js, Next.js, Gatsby.js, Vue3, Laravel, and basic Tailwind CSS apps.

    • 8. ellisonleao/magictools

    Code

    Engines and Frameworks

  • 🎉 Solarus - Cross-platform 2D Action/Adventure C++ game engine with Lua API and game editor.

    • 9. kdeldycke/awesome-iam

    Authentication

    OAuth2 & OpenID

  • Casdoorstars134 - A UI-first centralized authentication / Single-Sign-On (SSO) platform based. Supports OIDC and OAuth 2, social logins, user management, 2FA based on Email and SMS.

    • 10. wbkd/awesome-d3

    Utils

  • d3-interpolate-pathstars247 - Interpolates paths with different number of points

    • 11. markusschanta/awesome-jupyter

    Rendering/Publishing/Conversion

  • Ganimedestars2 - Store, version, edit and execute notebooks in sandboxes and integrate them directly via REST interfaces.
  • Voilastars3.3k - Rendering of live Jupyter Notebooks with interactive widgets, allowing dashboarding based on Jupyter Notebooks.

    • Visualization

  • ipychartstars25 - Interactive Chart.js plots in Jupyter.

    • 12. CodyReichert/awesome-cl

    Community

  • #lisp on Libera Chat - IRC channel for all Lisp dialects.
  • #clschool on Libera Chat - IRC channel for learning Common Lisp.
  • #lispcafe on Libera Chat - IRC channel for off-topic discussions.
  • #commonlisp on Libera Chat - main Common Lisp IRC channel.

    • 13. n2cholas/awesome-jax

    Tutorials and Blog Posts

  • Introduction to JAX by Kevin Murphy - Colab that introduces various aspects of the language and applies them to simple ML problems.

    • 14. wardley-maps-community/awesome-wardley-maps

    Quick Start

  • From Cloud to DevOps to Serverless in under 10 minutes using maps - A basic introduction to change in the IT industry using the concept of Wardley maps by Simon Wardley (9:56).

    • 15. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Projects Using Vue.js

    Open Source

  • Aimeosstars1.9k - Leading Laravel eCommerce framework to build ultra fast online shops, marketplaces and complex B2B applications scalable from 1 to 1,000,000,000+ items

    • 16. bs-community/awesome-minecraft

    Mods

    Performance

  • Sodium (for Fabric)stars1.8k - A Fabric mod designed to improve frame rates and reduce micro-stutter.

item.title: Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
1. love2d-community/awesome-love2d

Utilities

  • lovely-enginestars1 - A tool that makes setting up and using Love2d easier and with Moonscript support

    • 2. avelino/awesome-go

    Command Line

    Standard CLI

  • go-andotpstars4 - A CLI program to encrypt/decrypt andOTPstars3k files. Can be used as library as well.

    • Software Packages

    Other Software

  • hooflistars1 - Generate PlantUML diagrams from Chrome or Firefox network inspections.

    • Database

  • columnstars701 - High-performance, columnar, embeddable in-memory store with bitmap indexing and transactions.

    • 3. davisonio/awesome-irc

    Daemons

  • Ergostars1.3k - Modern server that's portable and designed around specifications (bleeding-edge IRCv3 support). (sourcestars1.3k)

    • Networks

  • LibertaCasa - Privacy endorsing community serving as a safe and open space for the discussion of various topics.

    • 4. awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted

    Pastebins

  • pastystars27 - Pasty is a fast and lightweight code pasting server. (Demo) MIT Go

    • Calendaring and Contacts Management

    IRC

  • Ergo - Modern IRCv3 server written in Go, combining the features of an ircd, a services framework, and a bouncer. (Source Codestars1.3k) MIT Go

    • Groupware

  • EspoCRM - CRM with a frontend designed as a single page application, and a REST API. (Demo, Source Codestars771) GPL-3.0 PHP

    • 5. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    Tools for Teams and Collaboration

  • Calendly — Calendly is the tool for connecting and scheduling meetings. Free plan provides 1 Calendar connection per user and Unlimited meetings. Desktop and Mobile apps also provided.

    • BaaS

  • Flutter Flow — Build your Flutter App UI without writing a single line of code. Also has a Firebase integration. Free plan includes full access to UI Builder and Free templates.

    • Other Free Resources

  • thedev.id — A free thedev.id subdomain for developers.

    • 6. gbdev/awesome-gbdev

    Related projects

  • GB Studio - Drag and drop game creator with simple, no knowledge required, visual scripting.
    • Resources to get started
    • Dedicated Discord

    • Software Development

    Compilers

  • GBDKstars527 - Maintained and modernized GBDK (Game Boy Development Kit) powered by an updated version of the SDCC toolchain. Provides a C compiler, assembler, linker and a set of libraries.
    • API docs: Getting Started
    • Examplesstars105
    • Documentation, links and tools

    • Reverse Engineering

    Game Disassemblies

  • Tetrisstars2 - Complete Tetris disassembly.

    • 7. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Themes

  • gbtstars476 - Go Bullet Train is a very customizable prompt builder inspired by Bullet Train that runs much faster. Includes many different status cars.

    • 8. vinjn/awesome-vulkan

    Bindings

  • Silk.NETstars671 - C# bindings for Vulkan and others. [MIT]

    • 9. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Resources

    Examples

  • Google Keep Clone with Vue + Firestorestars70 - Google Keep clone with Vue and Firestore written in TypeScript.
  • Vue 3 Shopping Cartstars6 - A Shopping cart example using Vue 3, Vite, daisyUI and Pinia.

item.title: Jun 19th, 2021
item.description:
1. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

Themes

  • seriousstars0 - Includes command exit status and git status decorations.

    • Plugins

  • sandboxdstars209 - Speed up your .zshrc & shell startup with lazy-loading by only running setup commands (e.g. eval "$(rbenv init -)", etc) when you need them.
  • fzf-itstars1 - Make any command interactive wrapping it with FZF functionality.
  • ugitstars203 - Lets you undo your last git operation.
  • zawstars498 - ZSH anything.el-like widget.

    • 2. avelino/awesome-go

    Utilities

  • manistars6 - CLI tool to help you manage multiple repositories.

    • 3. ayr-ton/awesome-geek-podcasts

    In Russian

  • Svoj Podcast - Podcast about the latest news in programming, IT and technologies. Hosted by Yurii Sydorets and Alex Poddiachyi

    • 4. sobolevn/awesome-cryptography

    Theory

    Courses

  • A Self-Study Course In Block-Cipher Cryptanalysis - This paper attempts to organize the existing literature of block-cipher cryptanalysis in a way that students can use to learn cryptanalytic techniques and ways to break algorithms, by Bruce Schneier.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    JavaScript

  • bcrypt-Node.js - Native implementation of bcrypt for Node.js.
  • crypticostars1.1k - Easy-to-use encryption system utilizing RSA and AES for JavaScript.
  • cryptojsstars313 - Provide standard and secure cryptographic algorithms for Node.js.
  • forgestars3.9k - Native implementation of TLS in JavaScript and tools to write crypto-based and network-heavy webapps.
  • IronNode - Transform encryption library, a variant of proxy re-encryption, for encrypting to users or groups, and easily adding strong data controls to Node.js apps.

    • Frameworks and Libs

    Objective-C

  • ObjC Themis - ObjC wrapper on Themis for iOS and macOS. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

item.title: Jun 18th, 2021
item.description:
1. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

Plugins

  • show-pathstars0 - Provides a function shows the $PATH line by line.

    • 2. rust-unofficial/awesome-rust

    Libraries

    Bioinformatics

  • nonnominandus/pdbtbxstars8 PDBTBX - PDB/mmCIF libary in Rust.

    • 3. mgramin/awesome-db-tools

    DevOps

  • Spawn - Cloud service for creating instant database copies for development and CI. No more local db installs, instant recovery to arbitrary save points, isolated copies for each feature branch or test. Instant provisioning regardless of database size.

    • 4. akullpp/awesome-java

    Projects

    IDE

  • Recaf - Bytecode editor.

    • 5. APA-Technology-Division/urban-and-regional-planning-resources

    Platforms and Software Resources

    Geospatial Data and Visualization

  • CARTO - CARTO is a world leading Location Intelligence platform, enabling organizations to host & use spatial data and enable analysis for more efficient delivery routes, better behavioural marketing, strategic store placements, and much more.

    • 6. mcauser/awesome-micropython

    Libraries

    Bluetooth

  • ublestars65 - Lightweight Bluetooth Low Energy driver written in pure python for micropython.

    • 7. bs-community/awesome-minecraft

    Websites

    Archives

  • MCArchive - Archives old, lost and forgotten Minecraft mods. Various other mods and stuff can be found on their Discord.
  • Minecraft Archive Project - Huge archive containing Minecraft mods, worlds, resource packs and many other resources (even forum posts!).
  • MCVersions - Archives most Minecraft jars.
  • BetaCraft Archive - Archives some missing Minecraft server jars.
  • MCPC+ Archive - Archive with some MCPC+ versions.

    • Mod Loaders

  • Quilt - A powerful fork of the Fabric project.
  • Rift - A Mod Loader for 1.13-1.13.2 (even Snapshots).

    • Mods

    Maps

  • VoxelMap - Formerly known as Zan's Minimap, providing basic map and radar functionality.

    • 8. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Components & Libraries

    Admin Template

  • vuestic-adminstars7.9k - Vue Admin Dashboard built with Vue 3 and vuestic-ui.

    • 9. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    APIs, Data and ML

  • Iploka — IP to Geolocation API - Forever free plan for developers with 10k requests per month limit.

item.title: Jun 17th, 2021
item.description:
1. h4cc/awesome-elixir

Images

  • gistars2 - An Elixir wrapper for GraphicsMagick command line.

    • 2. playcanvas/awesome-playcanvas

    Blockchain/Crypto/NFT

  • RareRooms - 3D virtual rooms for NFT collections.

    • 3. ahkscript/awesome-AutoHotkey

    Scripts

    Clipboard

  • ClipBoardMonitor - Monitor clipboard changes, show tooltip of word count for text or a temporary GUI for pictures.

    • 4. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Resources

    Tutorials

  • Vue.js SPA: Build a Powerful E-Commerce App

    • Resources

    External Resources

  • Vue.js Articles - Assorted Vue 2 and 3 tutorials and articles.
  • Best vue.js Courses On YouTube - Handpicked list of best Vue.js tutorials on YouTube

    • Components & Libraries

    Responsive

  • vuestic-uistars526 - A Vue.js 3.0 UI customizable UI Framework.

    • 5. awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted

    Blogging Platforms

  • htmly - Databaseless Blogging Platform (Flat-File Blog). (Demo, Source Codestars696) GPL-2.0 PHP

    • Feed Readers

    File transfer/synchronization

  • Z-Push - Implementation of Microsoft’s ActiveSync protocol. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 PHP

    • Feed Readers

    Single-click/drag-n-drop upload

  • Zipline - A lightweight, fast and reliable file sharing server that is commonly used with ShareX, offering a react-based Web UI and fast API. (Source Codestars69) MIT Nodejs

    • 6. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Plugins

  • fzf-utilsstars0 - Provides functions to kill proceses and find in path with fzfstars36.6k.
  • calibre-zaw-sourcestars3 - Calibre - E-book management source for zawstars498

    • Themes

  • lishstars0 - A casual theme. No roughness, just smooth. Includes git, user@host, last command exit status, current directory, current time and root status decorators.

    • 7. FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp

    ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 Icings/Partitionable pluginstars3 - Partitionable associations allowing for basic limiting per group.

    • 8. sbilly/awesome-security

    Web

    Development

  • TFSecstars2.7k - A static analysis tool for infrastucture as code (Terraform).

    • Operating Systems

    Privacy & Security

  • Tails OS - Tails is a portable operating system that protects against surveillance and censorship.

    • Other Awesome Lists

    Other Security Awesome Lists

  • Awesome Security Talks & Videosstars3.2k - A curated list of awesome security talks, organized by year and then conference.

    • 9. EbookFoundation/free-programming-books

    Django

  • Test-Driven Development With Python And Django (1.11)

    • 10. philsturgeon/awesome-earth

    Footprint Calculators

  • Cloud Carbon Footprint - An open source tool that provides visibility and tooling to measure, monitor and reduce public cloud carbon emissions. It supports multiple cloud providers including AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, and displays energy and carbon emission metrics in a dashabord, command line interface or exportable to CSV.

    • 11. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    Email

  • mailvalidator.io - Verify 300 emails/month for free, real-time API with bulk processing available

    • 12. ziadoz/awesome-php

    Dependency Management Extras

  • Compoer Require Checkerstars570 - CLI tool to analyze composer dependencies and verify that no unknown symbols are used in the sources of a package.
  • Composer Unusedstars674 - A CLI Tool to scan for unused composer packages.

    • 13. jthegedus/awesome-firebase

    Firebase Extensions

  • 🔧 Firebase Extension for Full-Text Searchstars19 - Extension to add full-text search in Firestore, by syncing the data to Typesensestars5.5k - an OSS alternative to Algolia.

    • 14. rossant/awesome-math

    Geometry and Topology

    Differential Geometry

  • Discrete Differential Geometry - Keenan Crane

item.title: Jun 16th, 2021
item.description:
1. ziadoz/awesome-php

Code Quality

  • CaptainHookstars519 - An easy-to-use and flexible Git hook library.

    • Numbers

  • DecimalObjectstars7 - A value object to handle decimals/floats easily and more precisely.

    Visualization Tools - Environments

  • altair

    • 3. vuejs/awesome-vue

    Components & Libraries

    Calendar

  • vue-sweet-calendarstars25 - A simple and sweet vue.js calendar

    • 4. ramitsurana/awesome-kubernetes

    Starting Point

  • How to Deploy a REST API in Kubernetes

    • 5. aliesbelik/awesome-jmeter

    Automation

    DSL

  • jmeter-as-codestars11 - Simple wrapper for JMeter to write and execute JMeter tests with Java.

    • 6. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Plugins

  • emacs (cowboyd)stars0 - Make Emacs the default for CLI operations like editing git commit messages; set up handy aliases.
  • emacs (flinner)stars0 - Uses the Emacs daemon capability, allowing the user to quickly open frames, whether they are opened in a terminal via a ssh connection, or X frames opened on the same host.

    • 7. mjhea0/awesome-fastapi

    Projects

    Boilerplate

  • openapi-python-clientstars179 - Generate modern FastAPI Python clients (via FastAPI) from OpenAPI.

    • 8. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    Artifact Repos

  • Artifactory - An artifact repository that supports numerous package formats like Maven, Docker, Cargo, Helm, PyPI, CocoaPods, and GitLFS. Incudes package scanning tool XRay and CI/CD tool Pipelines (formerly Shippable) with a free tier of 2,000 CI/CD minutes per month.
  • packagecloud.io — Easy to use repository hosting for: Maven, RPM, DEB, PyPi, NPM, and RubyGem packages (has free tier).

item.title: Jun 15th, 2021
item.description:
1. vinjn/awesome-vulkan

Tools

  • VKtracer - universal and easy-to-use profiler for Vulkan.

    • 2. analysis-tools-dev/static-analysis

    Multiple languages

  • cqcstars332 ⚠️ - Check your code quality for js, jsx, vue, css, less, scss, sass and styl files.
  • imhotepstars214 ⚠️ - Comment on commits coming into your repository and check for syntactic errors and general lint warnings.
  • include-gardenerstars52 ⚠️ - A multi-language static analyzer for C/C++/Obj-C/Python/Ruby to create a graph (in dot or graphml format) which shows all #include relations of a given set of files.

    • 3. APA-Technology-Division/urban-and-regional-planning-resources

    Platforms and Software Resources

    Environmental and Climate Planning Tools and Platforms

  • HAZUS - FEMA's Hazus Program provides standardized tools and data for estimating risk from earthquakes, floods, tsunamis, and hurricanes. Risk assessment resources and tools from the Hazus program are always freely available and transparently developed.

    • 4. unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

    Plugins

  • zsh-not-vimstars0 - Provides a function that automatically shames the user for forgetting they weren't in vim.

    • 5. ripienaar/free-for-dev

    DBaaS

  • HarperDb — Serverless cloud database, with dynamic schema based on JSON, 3000 IOPS with 1GB storage
